---
title: "Robotic Review Notes"
---

Welcome to the robotics knowledge base.

This site combines concept pages, runnable demos, and curated references.

## Start Here

- Open the left sidebar to navigate by topic.
- Visit the Path Planning section for algorithm notes and demos.
- Add new pages as the repository grows.

## Current Focus Areas

- Path planning
- High-level behavior control
- Foundations for robust robotics reasoning
